description: TypeScript Web API — Express-like architecture with DI, generics, middleware, barrel exports
known_limitations: BaseService is detected as abstract class but 'abstract' keyword is not tracked as metadata
Generic type parameters (BaseService<User>, Repository<User>) are not tracked as relationships
Barrel re-export pattern (export { X } from './x') is not tested yet — types/index.ts uses direct definitions
Arrow function middleware (authMiddleware, loggerMiddleware) detected as Function — correct but name comes from variable, not function
Return type properties ({ status, data }) detected as Property symbols — over-detection for inline object shapes
BaseService method calls (this.repository.findById) resolved as same-file self-calls, not cross-class delegation
